meta_title: For Freelancers: portfolio building to Solve slow development speed (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to portfolio building and overcome slow development speed. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Portfolio Building for Freelancers: Beat Slow Dev Speed
content.seo_description: Stop grinding. Use this advanced checklist to master portfolio building, accelerate your dev speed with Antigravity and Claude Code, and win high-ticket clients.
content.answer_block: Slow development stems from redundant manual scaffolding. By leveraging Antigravity for architectural blueprints and Claude Code for iterative implementation, you convert hours of boilerplate into minutes of high-value logic. This portfolio-first methodology ensures you ship production-ready assets faster, proving your expertise to clients while automating the heavy lifting.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, your client’s patience is thinning, and your IDE is drowning in repetitive boilerplate. Every second spent configuring environments or writing basic CRUD endpoints is a second you aren't shipping value. The industry doesn't reward the 'grind'; it rewards the architect who builds systems that build themselves.

It’s time to move beyond manual coding. By integrating Antigravity for rapid architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for intelligent, context-aware execution, you transform your workflow from a linear struggle into an automated assembly line. This isn't just about coding faster; it's about building a portfolio that demonstrates elite-level velocity.

steps.title: Architectural Scaffolding
steps.description: Define your stack and project structure using Antigravity to ensure scalability from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a production-grade SaaS boilerplate using Next.js 14, Tailwind CSS, and Supabase. Include authentication, role-based access control, and a modular folder structure optimized for rapid feature iteration.

steps.title: Database Schema Synthesis
steps.description: Automatically generate your database schema to eliminate manual table creation and migration headaches.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Drizzle ORM schema for a multi-tenant project management application. Include tables for users, teams, projects, and tasks with all necessary foreign key relations and indexes for performance.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "generate schema.ts for Drizzle ORM based on project requirements"

steps.title: Iterative Logic Injection
steps.description: Use Claude Code to implement complex business logic blocks into your scaffolded architecture.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a reusable server action for handling Stripe subscriptions that includes validation, error handling, and database updates for user tier status.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "implement stripe-subscription.ts with zod validation and error handling"

steps.title: Automated Testing Suites
steps.description: Generate comprehensive unit and integration tests to ensure your rapid builds remain bulletproof.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write Playwright tests for the user authentication flow, specifically covering sign-up, sign-in, and password reset edge cases.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "create e2e tests for auth flow using Playwright"

steps.title: Documentation & Deployment
steps.description: Automate the final polish of your codebase and deployment configuration for instant client handoff.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a professional README.md and a CI/CD pipeline configuration for Vercel deployment that includes linting, testing, and build stages.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "generate README and vercel.json for production deployment"

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'Golden Repository' of your most successful components that Antigravity can reference to maintain your personal coding style.
Use Claude Code's memory feature to store your client's specific design system tokens, ensuring consistency across every UI element you generate.
Never accept the first code output; use the 'Refactor' command in Claude Code to optimize for tree-shaking and bundle size reduction.
Treat your portfolio projects as micro-SaaS products; even a simple tool should have a polished landing page and a clean README to impress stakeholders.
Implement a custom CLI alias for your most-used Claude Code prompts to reduce the cognitive load of routine scaffolding tasks.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is deployed, audit the build time and refactor the components that caused the most friction. Feed these learnings back into your Antigravity templates to refine your workflow for the next client.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting the code and start orchestrating it. You have the tools, the blueprint, and the strategy to dominate the freelance market. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
